full_text:
Dongtuna 董荼那
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dongtuna (董荼那). Fought against Zhao Yun and Wei Yan. Captured by Zhang Ni. Dongtuna is a fictional character. Dongtuna was affiliated with Nanman.
